backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and appointment booking with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (header, hero, doctors, departments sections, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON catalog of all frontend source files with one-line summaries describing each file's purpose, covering components, hooks, styles, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'CARE HOSPITAL APPOINTMENT BOOKING SYSTEM' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections, manages authentication state, and conditionally renders the ProfileSetupModal for first-time users.
frontend/src/components/BookingSection.t: Appointment booking form component with auth guard, 7-field validation, backend submission via React Query mutation, and scroll-triggered CSS animations.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section displaying a Google Maps embed, contact info cards, and a quick contact form with validation and scroll-triggered CSS entrance animations.
frontend/src/components/DepartmentsSecti: Renders a grid of six medical department cards (Cardiology, Neurology, etc.) with icons, descriptions, and patient counts, each clicking to scroll to the booking section. Uses scroll-based animation via `useInView`.
frontend/src/components/DoctorCard.tsx: Displays a single doctor's profile card with photo, specialization, star rating, experience, and a 'Book Now' button that triggers a parent-provided callback.
frontend/src/components/DoctorsSection.t: Renders a grid of six hardcoded doctor profiles using `DoctorCard`, with scroll-triggered animations; clicking 'Book Now' scrolls to the booking form and pre-selects the doctor.
Displays four hospital feature cards (24/7 Emergency, Experienced Doctors, Online Reports, Easy Booking) in a responsive grid with scroll-triggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a four-column footer with hospital branding, quick navigation links, contact details, and social media icons, plus a Caffeine attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, mobile drawer menu, and an Internet Identity login/logout button; becomes styled glass-nav on scroll.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the landing page hero section with a headline, CTA buttons for booking appointments and viewing doctors, and a stats row showing patients served, doctor count, and years of excellence.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that collects and validates a new user's name and email, then saves the profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor, gating the query on actor readiness and authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and expose identity state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for user profile (fetch/save) and appointment (submit/fetch by email) operations against the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins, configures Tailwind layers, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the medical theme (light and dark), and declares utility classes for animations, buttons, and card styles.
frontend/src/lib/useInView.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to detect when a referenced element enters the viewport, firing once and then stopping observation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values using sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Poppins/Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens for UI components and a medical/hospital palette, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Care Hospital Appointment Booking System's architecture, implemented features, known issues, and image requirements for a React/Tailwind/Framer Motion healthcare web app.
